description: First designed in FS-479 as a small patrol ship for use by Vigilitas Interstellar, the Capercaillie swiftly entered production the same year under rising scrutiny of the corporations' operations from opposing groups. The design saw widespread use across Makosso-Warra's controlled territories, patrolling the space around the corporation's colonies and stations primarily engaging in anti-piracy, loss prevention, and enforcement of territorial claims. Post-ICW, many Capercaillie have been thoroughly reworked by MW Spaceworks to facilitate travel between the greater distances of the company's remaining holdings; notably receiving a streamlined atmospheric extractor system to allow it to act self-sufficient for some time in undeveloped (or unfriendly) stretches of space. With this added complexity, MW engineers are often contracted with active crews to maintain these systems and/or make further changes to the design. These overhauled vessels are often put to use in emergency response or recovery operations, aiding allied vessels in precarious situations and recovering high-value assets in the corporation's ongoing effort to recoup their losses in the recent conflict. This compact ship has a mixed reputation in the public eye, while often regarded as visible background elements of civilized Frontier space, groups with shaky relations are indiscreetly tagged and monitored while near facilities operated by MW or it's partners.
